title: LearningSkillCuratorOutput
description: Output shape for learning.skill-curator runs: the SKILL patch path, the matching DEC path, and the recurrence evidence.

skill_id.description: Skill identifier matching the cross-repo skill.schema.json id pattern.

skill_path.description: Repo-relative path to the SKILL.md, e.g. .agents/skills/run-weekly-brief/SKILL.md.

skill_version.description: Semantic version. New skills start at 0.1.0.

dec_path.description: Repo-relative path to the graduation DEC, e.g. decisions/DEC-CDCP-NNN-<slug>.md.

recurrence_count.description: Number of documented recurrences that justify the graduation. The curator refuses to graduate below three.

items.description: Commit SHA, dream report path, or prior SKILL id that justifies the recurrence.

human_approval_required.description: Always true. The DEC moves to status: approved only after a human signs off.
